extensionDescription.message: Izici zomculo ezithuthukisiwe ze-YouTube Music, i-Apple Music ne-Tidal, ezinokuvumelanisa komugqa nomugqa kanye nezwi nezwi.

sectionCoreFeatures.description: Section title in popup General tab

sectionDisplaySettings.description: Section title in popup Appearance tab

sectionDataManagement.description: Section title in popup Advanced tab

msgSettingsSaved.message: Izilungiselelo zigciniwe! Vuselela ikhasi le-YouTube ukuze usebenzise ushintsho.
msgSettingsSaved.description: Snackbar message after saving settings in popup

msgErrorSavingSettings.description: Snackbar error message when settings save fails

msgCacheClearedFailed.description: Snackbar error message when cache clear fails

msgCacheClearError.description: Snackbar error when cache clear communication fails

msgCacheRefreshed.description: Snackbar message after cache info refresh

msgCacheClearApiUnavailable.message: Ayikwazi ukusula i-cache: I-API yesandiso ayitholakali.
msgCacheClearApiUnavailable.description: Error when chrome runtime API is unavailable

settingsTitle.description: Title shown in full settings page header and nav drawer

msgSettingsSavedRestart.message: Izilungiselelo zigciniwe. Qala kabusha ithebhu yakho yomculo ukuze usebenzise ushintsho.
msgSettingsSavedRestart.description: Notification text when no platform tabs are found

msgSettingsSavedRestartPlatform.message: Izilungiselelo zigciniwe. Qala kabusha i-$PLATFORMS$ ukuze usebenzise ushintsho.

buttonRestartTabs.description: Restart button text for multiple tabs

descEnableExtension.message: Vula noma uvale isandiso kuwo wonke umhlaba.

descWordByWord.message: Vula ukugqanyiswa kwe-karaoke kwezwi nezwi uma kutholakala.

settingFullscreenSongInfo.description: Label for fullscreen song info toggle

descFullscreenSongInfo.message: Ibonisa imininingwane yenkondlo kuhlanganise nebha yokuthuthuka, usuku lokukhishwa, isihloko nomculi kwimodi yesikrini esigcwele.

settingUseSponsorBlock.description: Label for SponsorBlock toggle in settings

descUseSponsorBlock.message: Yeqa izingxenye ezingezona zomculo njengezingeniso, iziphetho noma izingxenye zezikhangiso.

settingPreferExternal.message: Khetha amagama omculo angaphandle ukuze uvumelanise umugqa nomugqa
settingPreferExternal.description: Label for Apple Music bypass toggle

descPreferExternal.message: Uma kuvunyelwe, uhlelo lokusebenza luzosebenzisa imithombo yamagama omculo yangaphandle uma i-Apple Music ihlinzeka kuphela ngokuvumelanisa komugqa nomugqa.
descPreferExternal.description: Description for Apple Music bypass toggle

labelCustomKpoeUrl.description: Label for custom server URL input

helperCustomKpoeUrl.message: Faka i-URL eyisisekelo yeseva ye-KPoe ozibambele yona ngokwakho.
helperCustomKpoeUrl.description: Helper text for custom KPoe URL

helperSourceOrder.message: Hudula bese uphonsa ukuze uhlele imithombo ye-Lyrics+.

msgAllSourcesAdded.description: Shown when all sources are already active

msgNoLocalLyrics.message: Awekho amagama omculo wendawo alayishiwe okwamanje.
msgNoLocalLyrics.description: Placeholder when no local lyrics exist

helperLyricsFile.message: Layisha ifayela le-LRC, ELRC, Apple TTML noma i-JSON.
helperLyricsFile.description: Helper text for lyrics file input

msgUploadRequired.description: Error when required fields are missing

confirmDeleteLyrics.description: Confirm dialog for deleting local lyrics

confirmClearLocalLyrics.message: Ingabe uyafuna ukusula wonke amagama omculo wendawo?
confirmClearLocalLyrics.description: Confirm dialog for clearing all local lyrics

msgErrorLoadingLocalLyrics.message: Iphutha ngenkathi kulayishwa amagama omculo wendawo: $ERROR$
msgErrorLoadingLocalLyrics.description: Error when loading lyrics list fails

descTranslationProvider.message: Khetha isevisi ozoyisebenzisela ukuhumusha amagama omculo.

helperGeminiApiKey.message: Ukhiye wakho ugcinwe endaweni yangakini futhi awuthunyelwa kunoma yimaphi amaseva angaphandle ngaphandle kwe-Google Gemini API.
helperGeminiApiKey.description: Helper text for Gemini API key

descRomanizationProvider.message: Ithola ngokuzenzakalelayo izinhlamvu zesi-Latin e-Lyrics+ API uma kungenzeka. Ngaphandle kwalokho, isevisi ekhethiwe izoyikhiqiza.

descGeminiRomanizationModel.message: Khetha imodeli ye-Gemini AI yezinhlamvu zesi-Latin.

descOverrideTranslateTarget.message: Setha mathupha ulimi amagama omculo okufanele ahunyushelwe kulo (isib. 'zu', 'en', 'ja').

helperCustomTranslateTarget.message: Faka ikhodi yolimi enezinhlamvu ezi-2 (isib. 'zu' kwisi-Zulu).

descOverrideAIPrompt.message: Sebenzisa imiyalo ngokwezifiso ngokuhumusha kwe-Gemini/OpenRouter. Sebenzisa i-{targetLang} ne-{lyrics}.

helperCustomAIPrompt.message: Kwenze kube ngokwakho umyalo othunyelwa ku-AI ukuze ahumushe. Sebenzisa i-{targetLang} olimini oluqondiswe kulo.

descOverrideRomanizePrompt.message: Sebenzisa imiyalo ngokwezifiso ngezinhlamvu zesi-Latin ze-Gemini/OpenRouter.

helperCustomRomanizePrompt.message: Kwenze kube ngokwakho umyalo othunyelwa ku-AI ngezinhlamvu zesi-Latin.

labelLargerTextMode.message: Umbukiso wombhalo omkhulu we: Zinhlamvu Zesi-Latin noma Amagama Omculo

descLargerTextMode.message: Khetha ukuthi iyiphi ingxenye yombhalo okufanele ibonakale inkulu.

descHideLatinPronunciation.message: Fihla ngokuzenzakalelayo umhlahlandlela wokuphinyiselwa uma amagama omculo esevele ekuhlamvu lwe-Latin.

descDynamicBkgVocal.message: Amazwi angemuva aqala ngaphambi kwemigqa eyinhloko azoboniswa phezulu.

descLightweightMode.message: Ikhulisa ukugqwayiza (animations) nemiphumela yokubukwayo ukuze isebenze kangcono kumadivayisi amala.

descHideOffscreen.message: Ifihla futhi isuse yonke imigqa egqwayizayo engabonakali manje. Kunconywa kumadivayisi anezincazelo eziphansi.

descBlurInactive.message: Ibenzisa umphumela wokufiphala (blur) emigqeni engaculwa okwamanje, efana ne-Apple Music.

descDynamicBackground.message: Ibenzisa ingemuva le-albhamu egqwayizayo lapho umdlali enwetshiwe. Lesi silungiselelo asisebenzi kwimodi yesikrini esigcwele.

descAudioBeatSync.message: Kwenza izingqimba zengemuva le-dynamic zishaye ngokuvumelana nesigqi somsindo. Kufanele icishwe uma usebenzisa i-Better Lyrics Shaders.

settingSongPaletteFullscreen.message: Sebenzisa iphalethi yengoma kumagama omculo wesikrini esigcwele

descSongPaletteFullscreen.message: Isebenzisa imibala ye-albhamu kumagama omculo kwimodi yesikrini esigcwele yevidiyo.

settingSongPaletteAll.message: Sebenzisa iphalethi yengoma yombhalo kuzo zonke izindlela

descSongPaletteAll.message: Isebenzisa imibala ye-albhamu kumagama omculo kuzo zonke izindlela zokubonisa.

helperOverridePaletteColor.message: Shintsha umbala wamagama omculo ube umbala owufunayo (umbhalo kuphela, hhayi ingemuva) (shiya kungenalutho ngokuzenzakalelayo).

helperCustomCSS.message: Sebenzisa izitayela zakho ekubonisweni kwamagama omculo. Sebenzisa ngokuqaphela.

descCacheStrategy.message: Iquma ukuthi amagama omculo azogcinwa isikhathi esingakanani endaweni yangakini.

aboutDescription.message: Lesi sandiso sizalwe ngombono olula: ukulalela umculo kufanele kube into ejulile, hhayi nje umsebenzi wasengemuva. Sikhathele amagama omculo ajwayelekile e-YouTube nezindawo ezindala, ngakho sinqume ukuzakhela umdlali esihlale isimfuna. Inhloso yethu ukwenza izikhathi zakho zomculo zibe zinhle kakhulu, zibe nokuxhumana, futhi zibe mnandi. i-youly+ ingumthombo ovulekile ngokuziqhenya. Uma uthola iphutha noma unombono, singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.

descConfigManagement.message: Khipha izilungiselelo zakho kufayela le-JSON noma ungenise usuka efayeleni.

msgNoActiveTabs.message: Awekho amathebhu omculo asebenzayo atholakele. Sicela uvuselele mathupha.
msgNoActiveTabs.description: Alert when no music tabs found for restart

titleShowHideApiKey.description: Tooltip for API key visibility toggle

titleDeleteLocalLyrics.description: Tooltip for delete local lyrics button

optionLyrics.description: Option in larger text mode dropdown

optionPronunciation.description: Option in larger text mode dropdown
